calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Monique Salvini, individually and dba Elegante Cleaners or Terry Larson.
Default entered against defendant Terry Larson on February 2/26/08.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment against defendant Monique Salvini, individually and dba Elegante Cleaners on February 26, 2008.
Order granting waiver of witness appearance at prove-up hearing filed March 27, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on February 26, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against Defendant Monique Salvini, individually and dba Elegante Cleaners and Terry Larson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $77,047.65.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,222.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,250.00.
Costs $451.00, for a total of $82,970.65.

It is further ordered that Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one PARKER 25HP 125PSI LOW NOXBOILER (PREMIX MODEL), and is entitled to its immediate possession, and that plaintiff have and recover said property from defendants.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Set For Trial On Jul-07-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-18-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 602
